3015.issue: [W3015] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-adapter@v1".

3017.issue: [W3017] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" should contain a step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1".

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (daikin.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5047.issue: [W5047] "admin/index.html" is most likely outdated since jsonConfig is used. Please consider removing it.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (daikin.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.daikin/blob/master/io-package.json).

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#290] "[iobroker-bot] Add Dependabot Ignore Rule for @types/node Major Version Updates"](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.daikin/issues/290)

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9506.issue: [E9506] i18n directory "admin/i18n" is excluded by .npmignore. Translations will be missing from the npm package.

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 20 is required as minimum, node.js 22 is recommended. The current engines.node clause ">=18" allows Node.js 18.0.0 as minimum. Please update it to require at least ">=20" at [package.json](https://github.com/Apollon77/ioBroker.daikin/blob/master/package.json).
